title: Canadian Citizenship - Canada.ca
content:
This section contains policy, procedures and guidance used by IRCC staff. It is posted on the department’s website as a courtesy to stakeholders.
CIC grants citizenship to thousands of people at ceremonies held across the country each year, as well as processes requests for proof or renunciation of citizenship.

## Granting citizenship
Requirements and tools to assess grant citizenship applications.
- Delegation of authority under the Citizenship Act and Citizenship Regulations

## Proof of citizenship
Applications for a document certifying Canadian citizenship.
- Documents establishing citizenship
- Application process for proof
- Types of citizenship certificates

## Acquisition and loss
Ways citizenship can be acquired and lost.
- Renunciation (given up)
- Keeping (retaining) citizenship status
General administration of the citizenship program, as well as procedures for handling routine and administrative tasks.
- General decision-making
- Receiving applications
